scan-failed.label: Check the project root is a readable Fresh project
scan-failed.why: Discovery could not scan the project. Confirm the root points at a Fresh project (has components/, islands/, or pages/) and that the directory is readable, then retry.

no-match.label: No tests matched the filter/files
no-match.why: The filter or files list selected zero runnable specs. Run `isolate list` to see each case's route and test names, then adjust the filter (it matches a spec file path OR `component/case`).

provision-failed.label: Could not provision ~/.isolate-runner
provision-failed.why: Provisioning the Playwright runner failed. Ensure Node/npm are on PATH and the home dir is writable, then retry — ensureRunner installs @playwright/test (version-matched) + rxjs + isolate-events.

runner-unavailable.label: Provision the runner, then retry
runner-unavailable.why: The Playwright runner under ~/.isolate-runner is missing or incomplete. Call GET /runner-status (runner.ensure) or run any `isolate` command once to provision it, then retry.
